@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing incomplete code or simplified implementations instead of the requested functionality), weak verification (failing to identify errors in generated code), step repetition (repeatedly stating the same thought or information), information withholding (not providing complete information to other agents), action-reasoning mismatch (proposing solutions that don't align with the identified problem), task derailment (focusing on simplified implementations instead of the original task), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), and premature termination (stopping the task before completion). There are also instances of loss of conversation history and unawareness of termination conditions.
